text:
Overview
Organization Owners can set absolute and idle session
timeouts for all users to align with security and
compliance requirements.
Absolute Session Timeout: The maximum amount of time a session can
be active, regardless of user activity. Also known as "maximum session
duration"
Idle Session Timeout: The maximum amount of time a session can be
active with no user activity. Also known as "session inactivity timeout" or
"maximum session inactivity duration"
